productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Beige Belts
description: In an off beat beige, this belt taps into this season's love affair with vibrant shades. Made with special care for the fashion conscious and stylish youth, this avant garde belt from united colors of benetton adds a glamorous touch to your attire. Wear it with jeans or over a dress, and look great both ways.Length: 83 cmMade of leather for durabilityTang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitBroad base to sit snug on the waistBrand logo embossed on tail CareUse a brass polish to maintain buckle shineUse a branded leather conditioner to protect the leather
